states.name: Aethrodon
states.title: Gossamer Drake
states.description:
"Day 26, on the road to elven lands:

I have slept in my saddle now for three days straight. Our caravan leader insists he will not stop until he spies a baby Aethrodon -- the blasted things appear only in total safety, he says. Camping anywhere else would doom us all, he says.

Confound these elves. Pandemonium or not, we're armed to the teeth. I think we can take our chances, tiny lizard's blessing be damned."

-- From The Travels of Caerwyn

states.name: Aethrodon
states.title: Gossamer Drake
states.description:
"Day 31, in the heart of the elven forests:

I'd seen nothing like it in all my days. Bedecked in bronze armor, brilliant as a shard of the summer sky -- this, I asked, is what comes of those skittish creatures we glimpsed on the road?

'Why else would we wait to see one before we camp?' the chieftain answered me. 'Wherever a young Aethrodon wanders, its mother guards its path. No enemy would dare approach.'"

-- From The Travels of Caerwyn
